episodes.passage_iast: ya enaṃ vetti hantāraṃ yaś cainaṃ manyate hatam

episodes.passage_english_gloss: He who thinks this Self is a slayer and he who thinks it is slain
episodes.correct_answer: The Self neither slays nor is it slain — 'hantāram' refers to the agent of action, not the true subject

The verse describes physical combat and the ethics of killing
The verse concerns action and non-action
Both slaying and being slain are valid interpretations depending on context

episodes.passage_english_gloss: Agni digests everything in the bodily tissues
